variants.title: HiFi Filter SAO 5287 Engine Breather Filter
variants.description: Genuine HiFi Filter SAO 5287 Engine Breather Filter. Easy to install and replace, the SAO 5287 is built to withstand demanding environments, offering long-lasting protection and reliability. Whether used in automotive, agricultural, construction, or industrial applications, this filter is an essential component for maintaining system health and performance.

variants.title: Mann Filter 3931070200 MANN+HUMMEL Spare Part | Replaces the HiFi Filter SAO 5287
variants.description: Replacement and maintenance parts for the proven filter housings and systems from MANN+HUMMEL.
